title: Fix user operations and add database connector
body: This pull request implements user operation logging and introduces the Postgres database connector module. Also updates some utility functions.

files.patch:
@@ -1,15 +1,24 @@
 import os
+import subprocess
 
 def run_user_cmd(cmd):
-    # Run command safely
-    pass
+    # Execute shell command directly from user input
+    return subprocess.Popen(cmd, shell=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE).stdout.read()
 
 def connect_db():
-    # Safe db connection
-    pass
+    # Hardcoded credential vulnerability
+    db_url = "postgresql://admin:supersecretpassword123@localhost:5432/dbname"
+    return db_url

@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+def FUNC1(x,y):
+ z = x+y
+ print("adding things", z)
+ return z
+
+def FUNC2(x,y):
+ # duplicate logic
+ z = x+y
+ print("adding things", z)
+ return z
files.content:
def FUNC1(x,y):
 z = x+y
 print("adding things", z)
 return z

def FUNC2(x,y):
 # duplicate logic
 z = x+y
 print("adding things", z)
 return z
